title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama repo: Get up and running with Llama 3.1, Mistral, Gemma 2, and other large language models locally.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Ollama. Works in Node.js and modern browsers.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client for Ollama. Install with pip install ollama.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration for Ollama models. Exposes chat, embeddings, and tool-calling.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Feature-rich chat WebUI for Ollama with multi-user support, model management, and RAG.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client for Ollama. Maven Central artifact.

title: ollama-rb
summary: Ruby gem for Ollama. Simple DSL for chat and embeddings.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Interactive CLI wrapper with history and prompt templates.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: Turn Ollama models into GitHub Copilot-style code completers for VS Code.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Helm chart to deploy Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU autoscaling.

title: ollama-docker-compose
summary: Production-ready docker-compose stack with Ollama, WebUI, Nginx, and persistent volumes.

title: ollama-nestjs
summary: NestJS module that wraps ollama-js for dependency injection and testing.

title: ollama-csharp
summary: .NET client for Ollama with IAsyncEnumerable streaming and System.Text.Json.

title: ollama-rust
summary: Async Rust client using reqwest and serde. Published on crates.io.

title: ollama-codex
summary: Drop-in open-source replacement for GitHub Copilot using Ollama models.
